---
title: "The Causal Layer"
subtitle: "Causal inference, econometrics, and the methods behind defensible decisions."
page-layout: full
toc: false
listing:
  - id: recent-posts
    contents: posts
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    max-items: 6
    categories: true
    fields: [image, date, title, description, categories, reading-time]
---

Applied writing on causal inference and econometrics, for analysts and
decision-makers who want rigor without the textbook padding.

::: {#recent-posts}
:::
